product_overview: CRM PXX v2 centralizes all deal-related activity around a single Deal (the Epicentre) with the Municipality as the root entity. The backend exposes aggregator endpoints to power the Epicentre view, a unified calendar derived from interactions, and a high-performance Kanban dashboard.
core_goals: Make the Deal the single Epicentre for all commercial activity and UI workflows.
Enforce Municipality as the root (no Deals or Contacts without a Municipality).
Provide a single source of truth for activity via an Interactions timeline used by UI and AI.
Expose aggregator endpoints that return pre-joined data for performant UI rendering (Deal full, Calendar events, Kanban).
Support reliable synchronization (IMAP deduplication by external_id) and AI integration for contextual assistance.
Enable scalable SaaS plan constraints and per-Deal overrides for commercial flexibility.

features.name: Deal Intelligence (Epicentre)
features.description: Single-call aggregation of a deal's full context: deal metadata, parent municipality, related contacts, and the chronological interactions timeline to populate the Epicentre view.
user_flows: GET /deals/{deal_id}/full with valid numeric deal_id -> Receive 200 OK with JSON containing deal, municipality, contacts, and interactions array
GET /deals/{deal_id}/full with non-existent deal_id -> Receive 404 Not Found with error payload
GET /deals/{deal_id}/full with invalid id format (e.g., 'abc') -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error
GET /deals/{deal_id}/full when database query fails -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error with diagnostic message

features.name: Native Calendar (Unified Events Feed)
features.description: API feed that returns calendar events derived from the Interactions timeline so the UI can render timelines and calendar views without client-side joins.
user_flows: GET /calendar/events?start=2026-04-01&end=2026-04-30 -> Receive 200 OK with array of events (each includes timestamp, type, summary, related_deal_id and interaction_id)
GET /calendar/events without start/end or with malformed dates -> Receive 400 Bad Request with parameter validation errors
GET /calendar/events when data store is unreachable -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error indicating event retrieval failure

features.name: Kanban Dashboard (Deals by Status)
features.description: High-performance endpoint that returns deals organized by status (Kanban columns) and includes ordering metadata to support drag-and-drop optimistic updates on the client.
user_flows: GET /deals/kanban -> Receive 200 OK with payload grouping deals into status columns, each deal includes id, title, municipality_id and ordering index
GET /deals/kanban when no deals exist -> Receive 200 OK with empty column arrays (client renders empty Kanban columns)
GET /deals/kanban when database times out -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable with retry suggestion

routes.description: Get full details for a specific deal including municipality, contacts, and interactions.
Get calendar events derived from interaction history.
Get the state of the Kanban board organized by deal status.

features.name: Deal Intelligence
features.description: Comprehensive retrieval of deal data for the "Epicentre" view.

features.name: Native Calendar
features.description: Unified timeline and calendar feed derived from interactions.

features.name: Kanban Dashboard
features.description: High-performance data retrieval for the Kanban board with status categorization.
